info.name: PathGen AI Backend API
info.description:
API collection for PathGen AI — a personalized AI learning roadmap generator powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash.

**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}`

**Default:** `http://localhost:8080`

All endpoints are prefixed with `/api`. Responses use JSON. Error responses follow a consistent shape with `error`, `status`, and `timestamp` fields.

variable.description: Backend base URL. Change to your deployed URL (Railway, Vercel, etc.) as needed.

request.description: Returns the service status. Use this to verify the backend is reachable before making other calls.

body.raw:
{
  "skill": "React",
  "level": "BEGINNER",
  "dailyHours": 2,
  "durationDays": 30,
  "learningGoal": "Build a full-stack web app with React"
}

request.description:
Generate a 30-day personalized roadmap for a beginner learning React.

**Note:** This calls the Gemini 2.5 Flash API and may take up to 90 seconds.

### Request fields
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `skill` | string | Yes | The skill to learn (e.g. "Java", "Python", "React") |
| `level` | string | Yes | `BEGINNER` \| `INTERMEDIATE` \| `ADVANCED` |
| `dailyHours` | int | No (default: 2) | Daily study hours |
| `durationDays` | int | No (default: 30) | Roadmap length in days |
| `learningGoal` | string | No | Custom goal description |

response.name: 200 OK — Roadmap Generated
400 Bad Request — Validation Error

body.raw:
{
  "skill": "Java",
  "level": "INTERMEDIATE",
  "dailyHours": 3,
  "durationDays": 60,
  "learningGoal": "Master Spring Boot and build production-ready REST APIs"
}

request.description: Example for an intermediate learner wanting a 60-day Java/Spring Boot roadmap.

body.raw:
{
  "skill": "Machine Learning",
  "level": "ADVANCED",
  "dailyHours": 4,
  "durationDays": 90,
  "learningGoal": "Implement and deploy production ML models at scale"
}

request.description: Example for an advanced learner — 90-day Machine Learning roadmap with 4 hours/day.
Minimal request — only `skill` and `level` are required. The backend applies defaults: `dailyHours=2`, `durationDays=30`.
Intentionally missing `skill` to demonstrate 400 validation error response.

Save progress for a specific day in a roadmap.

**Note:** The frontend currently uses `localStorage` for persistence. This endpoint is intended for future database integration and currently logs the update server-side.

### Request fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `roadmapId` | string | UUID of the roadmap |
| `dayNumber` | int | Day number being updated |
| `completed` | boolean | Whether the day was completed |
Unmark a day as complete (toggle off).
